pr.title: Record: SP2048 + 3-Layer Recurrence + SWA + BigramHash + Legal TTT — val_bpb 1.0955 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: SP2048 BPE model adds 3-layer depth recurrence, SWA, BigramHash logits, MuonEq tuning, and legal score-first TTT before GPTQ int6 compression.
techniques: 3-layer depth recurrence with parallel residual start layer
SWA from 75% plus MuonEq-R and QK-gain tuning
BigramHash logits paired with legal score-first TTT and GPTQ int6+Brotli
